selection_reason: Dropped at compact stage because the amino-acid block is already well covered and alanine is less specific than the retained BCAA, aromatic, and glutamine/histidine representatives.
Dropped at compact stage because it is nearly redundant with both leucine and valine (|rg| > 0.95) and was not needed once the BCAA cluster remained represented by Leu and Val.
Dropped at compact stage because the ketone block is already represented by acetate, acetoacetate, and beta-hydroxybutyrate, while acetone is the most dispensable support marker.
